reference: Bolnick et al. 2011 Why intraspecific trait variation matters in community ecology
role_in_introduction: Foundational ecological importance of individual and within-species variation
notes: Supports interaction and community consequences but not image-derived biological variance

reference: Albert et al. 2011 When and how should intraspecific variability be considered in trait-based plant ecology
role_in_introduction: Plant-specific framework for incorporating ITV
notes: Supports scale- and question-dependent treatment of ITV

reference: Messier et al. 2010 How do traits vary across ecological scales
role_in_introduction: Explicit hierarchical partitioning of trait variation
notes: Supports separating individual population species and broader scales

reference: Violle et al. 2012 The return of the variance
role_in_introduction: Argument for retaining trait distributions rather than means
notes: Use for distributional framing

reference: Siefert et al. 2015 Global meta-analysis of ITV in plant communities
role_in_introduction: Quantitative evidence that ITV contribution is trait- and scale-dependent
notes: Do not transfer published percentages directly to image-derived variance

reference: Kattge et al. 2011 TRY global database
role_in_introduction: Original TRY architecture and purpose
notes: Do not imply TRY stores only means

reference: Kattge et al. 2020 TRY enhanced coverage
role_in_introduction: Updated scope coverage and open-access architecture
notes: Frame public images as complementary rather than replacement

reference: Maitner et al. 2018 BIEN R package
role_in_introduction: Integration of taxonomy occurrence and trait information
notes: Clarify database versus downstream aggregation

reference: Wäldchen and Mäder 2018 Machine learning for image-based species identification
role_in_introduction: Shows dominant taxonomic classification focus and image-analysis challenges
notes: Correct citation key and diacritics

reference: Van Horn et al. 2018 iNaturalist Species Classification and Detection Dataset
role_in_introduction: Scale heterogeneity imbalance and real-world image conditions
notes: Supports long-tailed uncontrolled data framing

reference: Rzanny et al. 2019 Flowers leaves or both
role_in_introduction: Organ and perspective effects on image classification
notes: Supports viewpoint and context framing

reference: Katal et al. 2022 Deep learning in plant phenological research
role_in_introduction: Image phenology field and methodological limitations
notes: Supports claim that categorical phenology dominates many pipelines

reference: Sharma et al. 2025 PlantTraitNet
role_in_introduction: Nearest located predecessor for global continuous trait inference from citizen-science photos
notes: Check peer-reviewed status before submission and avoid first-ever claim

reference: Troudet et al. 2017 Taxonomic bias in biodiversity data and societal preferences
role_in_introduction: Taxonomic and societal unevenness in biodiversity records
notes: Supports non-random taxonomic coverage

reference: Di Cecco et al. 2021 Observing the observers
role_in_introduction: Participant contribution structure and implications for iNaturalist science
notes: Supports observer and participation bias

reference: Ackerfield et al. 2020 A prickly puzzle
role_in_introduction: Conflict between traditional generic limits and molecular structure
notes: Publisher metadata still needed

reference: Bureš et al. 2018 Cirsium greimleri
role_in_introduction: Example where ploidy morphology and genetic evidence separated formerly combined lineages
notes: Verify pagination before submission

reference: Bureš et al. 2023 Genome size and GC content in Carduinae
role_in_introduction: Cytogenomic diversity dysploidy polyploidy and phylogenetic context
notes: Do not use as resolved species tree

reference: Michálková et al. 2023 Hybridization may endanger Cirsium bertolonii
role_in_introduction: Named primary evidence for contemporary hybridization and conservation relevance
notes: Verify article number DOI and detailed mechanism

reference: Moreyra et al. 2023 African Mountain Thistles
role_in_introduction: Regional lineages formerly included in broad genera form distinct clades
notes: Supports systematic complexity not adaptive radiation

reference: Primary floral-orientation studies on rain temperature radiation and pollinators
role_in_introduction: Biological motivation for orientation module
notes: Keep mechanism language cautious until this search is completed

reference: Reviews and primary studies of anthocyanins climate soil and pollinator vision
role_in_introduction: Biological motivation for colour module
notes: Separate physiological signalling and edaphic mechanisms
